findings.description: The source's Javadoc spec comment table lists failure codes NR11AA4001, NR11AA5001, NR11AA5000 (NR11AA prefix), while the actual implementation code uses NR11AC4001, NR11AC5001, NR11AC5000 (NR11AC prefix). The knowledge file only includes the NR11AC codes in both the table and hints, omitting the NR11AA codes entirely. Since both sets of codes appear in the source, NR11AA4001, NR11AA5001, NR11AA5000 should be added to s2 hints so searches using the spec-comment codes can locate this file.
